id: I'm Not The Only One Sam Smith
folderName: I'm Not The Only One Sam Smith
setting: Sarah confronts David in their living room about his infidelity, leading to their breakup.
lyrics:
You and me, we made a vow
For better or for worse
I can't believe you let me down
But the proof's in the way it hurts
For months on end, I've had my doubts
Denyin' every tear
I wish this would be over now
But I know that I still need you here

You say I'm crazy
'Cause you don't think I know what you've done
But when you call me "baby"
I know I'm not the only one

You've been so unavailable
Now, sadly, I know why

Your heart is unobtainable
Even though Lord knows you kept mine

You say I'm crazy
'Cause you don't think I know what you've done
But when you call me "baby"
I know I'm not the only one

I have loved you for many years
Maybe I am just not enough
You've made me realise my deepest fear
By lyin' and tearin' us up

You say I'm crazy
'Cause you don't think I know what you've done
But when you call me "baby"
I know I'm not the only one
You say I'm crazy

'Cause you don't think I know what you've done
But when you call me "baby"
I know I'm not the only one

I know I'm not the only one
I know I'm not the only one
And I know, and I know, and I know, and I know, and I know, and I know, know
I know I'm not the only one

lyricsJa.en:
You and me, we made a vow
For better or for worse
lyricsJa.ja:
あなたと私、誓い合ったわね
健やかなる時も、病める時も

lyricsJa.en:
I can't believe you let me down
But the proof's in the way it hurts
lyricsJa.ja:
私を裏切るなんて信じられない
でも、この胸の痛みが何よりの証拠

lyricsJa.en:
For months on end, I've had my doubts
Denyin' every tear
lyricsJa.ja:
何ヶ月もの間、疑いを抱きながら
流れる涙をずっと否定し続けてきた

lyricsJa.en:
I wish this would be over now
But I know that I still need you here
lyricsJa.ja:
もう終わりにしたいのに
今でもあなたを必要としている自分がいる

lyricsJa.en:
You say I'm crazy
'Cause you don't think I know what you've done
lyricsJa.ja:
あなたは私を「おかしい」と言うわね
自分の過ちに私が気づいていないと思っているから

lyricsJa.en:
But when you call me "baby"
I know I'm not the only one
lyricsJa.ja:
でも、私を「ベイビー」と呼ぶその声で
私だけじゃないんだって分かってしまうの

lyricsJa.en:
You've been so unavailable
Now, sadly, I know why
lyricsJa.ja:
ずっと心ここにあらずだった理由が
今、悲しいほどはっきりと分かったわ

lyricsJa.en:
Your heart is unobtainable
Even though Lord knows you kept mine
lyricsJa.ja:
あなたの心はもう手に入らない
私の心はずっとあなたのものだったのに

lyricsJa.en:
You say I'm crazy
'Cause you don't think I know what you've done
lyricsJa.ja:
あなたは私を「おかしい」と言うわね
自分の過ちに私が気づいていないと思っているから

lyricsJa.en:
But when you call me "baby"
I know I'm not the only one
lyricsJa.ja:
でも、私を「ベイビー」と呼ぶその声で
私だけじゃないんだって分かってしまうの

lyricsJa.en:
I have loved you for many years
Maybe I am just not enough
lyricsJa.ja:
何年もあなたを愛し続けてきたわ
私だけでは足りなかったのかしら

lyricsJa.en:
You've made me realise my deepest fear
By lyin' and tearin' us up
lyricsJa.ja:
嘘を重ねて私を傷つけ
一番恐れていたことを現実に変えたのね

lyricsJa.en:
You say I'm crazy
'Cause you don't think I know what you've done
lyricsJa.ja:
あなたは私を「おかしい」と言うわね
自分の過ちに私が気づいていないと思っているから

lyricsJa.en:
But when you call me "baby"
I know I'm not the only one
lyricsJa.ja:
でも、私を「ベイビー」と呼ぶその声で
私だけじゃないんだって分かってしまうの
おかしいのは私だって言うのね

lyricsJa.en:
'Cause you don't think I know what you've done
But when you call me "baby"
I know I'm not the only one
lyricsJa.ja:
何も知らないと思っているからそんなことが言えるの
でも「ベイビー」と呼ばれるたび、私一人じゃないって確信する

lyricsJa.en:
I know I'm not the only one
I know I'm not the only one
lyricsJa.ja:
私だけじゃないことくらい分かっている
分かっているのよ

lyricsJa.en:
And I know, and I know, and I know, and I know, and I know, and I know, know
I know I'm not the only one
lyricsJa.ja:
分かってる、痛いほど分かっているの
私はあなたにとって唯一の人じゃないってことを

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: David, I can't do this anymore.
sentences.displayHtml: David, I can't do this anymore.

sentences.text: For months on end, I've had my doubts about where you've been.
sentences.displayHtml: For months on end, I've had my doubts about where you've been.

conversation.japanese: デイビッド、もう無理よ。ここ何ヶ月も、あなたがどこで何をしていたのかずっと疑ってたの。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Honestly, you're acting crazy right now.
sentences.displayHtml: Honestly, you're acting crazy right now.

conversation.japanese: 何を言ってるんだ？正直言って、今の君はちょっとどうかしてるよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Don't say I'm crazy just because you think I don't know what you've done.
sentences.displayHtml: Don't say I'm crazy just because you think I don't know what you've done.

sentences.text: You've been so emotionally unavailable lately.
sentences.displayHtml: You've been so emotionally unavailable lately.

conversation.japanese: 私が何も知らないと思ってるからって、おかしい扱いしないで。最近のあなたは明らかに心がここにあらずだったわ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I've just been stressed with work.
sentences.displayHtml: I've just been stressed with work.

sentences.text: Look, baby, let’s just calm down and talk.
sentences.displayHtml: Look, baby, let’s just calm down and talk.

conversation.japanese: 仕事でストレスが溜まってただけだよ。なあベイビー、落ち着いて話そう。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: It hurts because I know I'm not the only one you're saying that to anymore.
sentences.displayHtml: It hurts because I know I'm not the only one you're saying that to anymore.

conversation.japanese: ベイビーなんて呼ばないで！他の誰かにもそう言ってるんでしょう。私だけじゃないって分かってるんだから。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: You know I've loved you for years.
sentences.displayHtml: You know I've loved you for years.

conversation.japanese: そんなの嘘だ！俺が何年も君を愛してきたことは分かってるだろ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Then why are you tearing us apart with all the lying?
sentences.displayHtml: Then why are you tearing us apart with all the lying?

sentences.text: I guess I was just not enough for you.
sentences.displayHtml: I guess I was just not enough for you.

conversation.japanese: じゃあどうして嘘を重ねて私たちをバラバラにするの？結局、私じゃ足りなかったのね。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I never wanted to let you down, but if you don't trust me anymore, we're over.
sentences.displayHtml: I never wanted to let you down, but if you don't trust me anymore, we're over.

conversation.japanese: 君を裏切るつもりはなかった。でも、もう俺を信じられないなら、終わりにしよう。
